note: Per-neighborhood registry: the commons's OWN list of agents/rapps/senses/organs that travel with the planting. Upstream kody-w/RAR carries the canonical @rapp/ namespace; this neighborhood bundles a verified copy so the tether stays in-contract when upstream is unreachable. Article XLVII (substrate-agnostic federation): tether_requirements URLs walk neighborhood-first → upstream RAR → local relative, taking the first 200.

agents.name: @rapp/commons_post
agents.purpose: Compose canonical rapp-commons-event/1.0 objects for the host to sign + post.

agents.name: @rapp/estate_outbound
agents.purpose: Stage signed events on the operator's outbound lane for federation pull.
